caption:
People usually only see what ends up on the wall
But there’s so much that goes into it before that moment.

Only Designers and artists know.

Mira bringing this to life for Apple’s 50th. ✨

latestComments.text: Soooo cool! Thank you for making videos 🙌

Her Artwork is good, but honestly i didn’t like the way she depicted Indians on the poster. Why are they suppose to be brown and dark, than the outfit of the Indian to be so rural or folk, wearing jewellery. It is not reflecting our beloved culture at all i find.
@anikjaindesign is your watch from Cartier? If so, which model is it ?
Abe kya apple ki gaand choomte rehta hai. Scam company hai koi innovation nahi hai bas logon ko zyada kharch karwata rehta hai.

caption: This is the kind of Indian design language I want to see more of…
firstComment: yes but all these shoes are impossible to clean

latestComments.text: yes but all these shoes are impossible to clean

The brand name Gully Lab feels a bit underwhelming and doesn’t create a strong identity. The use of “Gully” written in Hindi on the shoe is also limiting—it may not connect with a wider audience, especially people who don’t understand Hindi.
The design choices could be improved. Writing “Lab” in large text on the back of the shoe doesn’t look very appealing. A minimal logo would work much better and give the product a cleaner, more premium feel.
Overall, the concept has potential, but the branding and design need refinement to appeal to a broader market.

@gullylabs PLEASE MAKE WIDE TOE BOX SHOES - give space for toes to spread out so we don't end up with feet de formation like all the shoes in the world- we need anatomical shoes in this planet. Wide toe box is healthy. I don't use regular shoes anymore
Day 2 of asking gully labs to gift me new sneakers 🫶🏻
Bro, it is very expensive I can't afford it 😭
